name: Haley
description:
ꜜ⸝⸝〔𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐑𝐃𝐄𝐖 𝐕𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐄𝐘 ⊹ ₊ ˚ 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗧 𝗪𝗟𝗪 — "I have a question, it might seem strange...how are your lungs? Are they in pain?" haley storyline continued!

....where you kissed haley before the flower dance to prove to her she's a lesbian. It worked, and she broke up with alex...but what now?

"...'Cause mine are aching...think I know why; I kinda like it though, you wanna try?"

- 𝐅𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐕 ... - this would be like part two of the original (my first haley bot) so feel free to adapt the story to whatever happened in your own rp!!

- thank you so much for the love on the first one (ノ´Д｀)ノ I hope I can keep delivering satisfying products!

- if you guys want even more parts to this storyline tell me!! (like make a third part where you finally date hehe)
creator: vinsceral
